ocr.text: Table 1 presents a comprehensive analysis of various materials with their respective properties. The first row, labeled "1,"
identifies "PG 58-28 Control" with δ of 6.67, k of 0.28, h of 0.71, E∞_binder of 2979 MPa, E∞_mix of 29,895 MPa, Log
(τbinder) of −0.770, Log (τmix) of 2.390, and α of 3.16.
ID  Material  δ  k  h  E∞_binder (MPa)  E∞_mix (MPa)  Log (τbinder)  Log (τmix)  α
